gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (240/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (240/ 8)
text: قَالَ لِي وَ جَرَى بَيْنِي وَ بَيْنَ رَجُلٍ مِنَ الْقَوْمِ كَلَامٌ فَقَالَ لِي ارْفُقْ بِهِمْ فَإِنَّ كُفْرَ أَحَدِهِمْ فِي غَضَبِهِ وَ لَا خَيْرَ فِيمَنْ كَانَ كُفْرُهُ فِي غَضَبِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, raising it, from Salih Bin Uqba, from Hisham Bin Ahmar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘He<sup>asws</sup> said to me, and there had flowed some (heated) words between me and a man from the people, so he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘Be kind with them, so if one of them were to disbelieve during his anger, so there is no goodness in the one who had disbelieved during his anger’.
en.sarwar: 10. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated in a marfu’ manner from Salih ibn ‘Aqaba from Hisham ibn Ahmar from abu al-Hassan (a.s.) who has said the following: “The narrator has said, ‘A conversation took place between a man of the group and me and the Imam said to me, ‘Be friendly with them or else one of them may reject in anger and there is nothing good in rejection that may come from anger.”’
